column1: Daylen Lile headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks with a scorching 71.2% hit probability, batting third for Miami and flashing a steady lefty bat against Chris Paddack in a hitter-friendly park—plus, he’s got the platoon edge working in his favor. Right behind him, Nico Hoerner brings a reliable top-of-the-order profile for Oakland, and his strong contact skills should play well in another favorable road matchup, even with the opposing pitcher still unannounced. Keep an eye on Jacob Wilson and Trea Turner as well; both lead off for their squads and offer consistent at-bats, with Turner also holding a platoon advantage at home. These names are built for streaks—lock in your picks with confidence.
